'''robayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubedinous|rubedinous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubedinous|rubedinous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| robayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:robayithi|robayithi]] || [[word:robayiji|robayiji]] || [[word:robayishi|robayishi]] || [[word:robayiki|robayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:robayuthuthu|robayuthuthu]] || [[word:robayujuju|robayujuju]] || [[word:robayushushu|robayushushu]] || [[word:robayukuku|robayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:robayuthu|robayuthu]] || [[word:robayuju|robayuju]] || [[word:robayushu|robayushu]] || [[word:robayuku|robayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:robayufthuf|robayufthuf]] || [[word:robayufjuf|robayufjuf]] || [[word:robayufshuf|robayufshuf]] || [[word:robayufkuf|robayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:robayethe|robayethe]] || [[word:robayeje|robayeje]] || [[word:robayeshe|robayeshe]] || [[word:robayeke|robayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:robayothotho|robayothotho]] || [[word:robayojojo|robayojojo]] || [[word:robayoshosho|robayoshosho]] || [[word:robayokoko|robayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:robayotho|robayotho]] || [[word:robayojo|robayojo]] || [[word:robayosho|robayosho]] || [[word:robayoko|robayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:robayofthof|robayofthof]] || [[word:robayofjof|robayofjof]] || [[word:robayofshof|robayofshof]] || [[word:robayofkof|robayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:robayÃŸfthÃŸf|robayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfjÃŸf|robayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfshÃŸf|robayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfkÃŸf|robayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:robayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|robayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|robayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|robayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|robayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:robayÃŸfthÃŸf|robayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfjÃŸf|robayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfshÃŸf|robayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfkÃŸf|robayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:robayÃŸfthÃŸf|robayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfjÃŸf|robayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfshÃŸf|robayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:robayÃŸfkÃŸf|robayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:robayÃḊthÃḊ|robayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:robayÃḊjÃḊ|robayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:robayÃḊshÃḊ|robayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:robayÃḊkÃḊ|robayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:robayathatha|robayathatha]] || [[word:robayajaja|robayajaja]] || [[word:robayashasha|robayashasha]] || [[word:robayakaka|robayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:robayatha|robayatha]] || [[word:robayaja|robayaja]] || [[word:robayasha|robayasha]] || [[word:robayaka|robayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:robayafthaf|robayafthaf]] || [[word:robayafjaf|robayafjaf]] || [[word:robayafshaf|robayafshaf]] || [[word:robayafkaf|robayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:robayasha|robayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:robayshÃḋsha|robayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:robayrosha|robayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:robaymusha|robaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:robayasha|robayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorobaynkshÃḋsha|gorobaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorobaynkrosha|gorobaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorobaynkmusha|gorobaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorobaynkyasha|gorobaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:robabayasha|robabayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:robabayshÃḋsha|robabayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:robabayrosha|robabayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:robabaymusha|robabaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:robabayasha|robabayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorobabaynkshÃḋsha|gorobabaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorobabaynkrosha|gorobabaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorobabaynkmusha|gorobabaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorobabaynkyasha|gorobabaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rebÃḊyasha|rebÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rebÃḊyshÃḋsha|rebÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rebÃḊyrosha|rebÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rebÃḊymusha|rebÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rebÃḊyasha|rebÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorebÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gorebÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorebÃḊynkrosha|gorebÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorebÃḊynkmusha|gorebÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorebÃḊynkyasha|gorebÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:robfayasha|robfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:robfayshÃḋsha|robfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:robfayrosha|robfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:robfaymusha|robfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:robfayasha|robfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorobfaynkshÃḋsha|gorobfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorobfaynkrosha|gorobfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorobfaynkmusha|gorobfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorobfaynkyasha|gorobfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
